title: Kincekara/nf-haphir pipeline - params.input schema
description: Schema for the file provided with params.input

sample.errorMessage: Sample name must be provided and cannot contain spaces

long_fq.errorMessage: HiFi reads must be provided, cannot contain spaces and must have extension '.fq.gz', '.fastq.gz or '.bam'

short_fq1.errorMessage: FastQ file for reads 1 must be provided, cannot contain spaces and must have extension '.fq.gz' or '.fastq.gz'

short_fq2.errorMessage: FastQ file for reads 2 cannot contain spaces and must have extension '.fq.gz' or '.fastq.gz'

organism.errorMessage: Organism name provided in the format 'Genus species' or 'Genus species subspecies/strain'
